ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Episode ID of the movie (e.g., 4 for A New Hope) */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary producer of the movie */,
  "opening_crawl" TEXT /* Opening crawl text providing a synopsis of the movie's plot */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the production of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie (e.g., PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distribution company */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of movies directed by the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the producer */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of movies produced by the producer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the producer */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Death date of the producer (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the producer */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "first_appearance_movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie where the character first appears */,
  "last_appearance_movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie where the character last appears */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the character in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the character in kilograms */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_first_appearance_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("first_appearance_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_last_appearance_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_appearance_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the actor */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of movies the actor has appeared in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the actor in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the actor in kilograms */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character appearance */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "character_role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the movie */,
  "appearance_time" INTEGER /* Time (in minutes) the character appears in the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_appearances_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_appearances_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actor_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor appearance */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character the actor portrays */,
  "appearance_time" INTEGER /* Time (in minutes) the actor appears in the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_appearances_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_appearances_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actor_appearances_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing campaign */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms used for the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing campaign */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue during the opening weekend */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Total domestic gross revenue */,
  "international_gross" REAL /* Total international gross revenue */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total global gross revenue */,
  "opening_day_gross" REAL /* Gross revenue on the opening day */,
  "opening_weekend_theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters showing the movie on the opening weekend */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views on digital platforms */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on digital platforms */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on digital platforms */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares on digital platforms */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Average view duration on digital platforms */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions on digital platforms */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_engagement_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator, marketer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the database */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
